name: ASTN
description: language support for ASTN (Abstract Syntax Tree Notation, pronounced Aston')
author: corno

astn.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Controls the maximum number of problems produced by the server.

astn.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.

scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.validatePublishReadiness: git diff --exit-code && npm install && npm run build
scripts.pubMinor: npm run validatePublishReadiness && npm version minor && git push && vsce publish
scripts.pubPatch: npm run validatePublishReadiness && npm version patch && git push && vsce publish
scripts.update2latestAndPublishMinor: npm run validatePublishReadiness && npm run update2latest && npm run test && git commit -am "u2l" && npm run pubMinor
scripts.update2latestAndPublishPath: npm run validatePublishReadiness && npm run update2latest && npm run test && git commit -am "u2l" && npm run pubPatch
